name: Eggplant Freezer Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tuna and set aside.
2. Thinly slice zucchini lengthwise and set aside.
3. Slice eggplant crosswise into 1/4-inch thick pieces.
4. Dip each eggplant slice in beaten eggs, then coat with flour.
5. Brown the eggplant slices in 1/3 cup oil; remove from pan.
6. Saute onion and garlic in remaining oil until soft.
7. Stir in tomatoes, tomato sauce, wine, and seasonings; simmer for 10 minutes.
8. Remove from heat; stir in tuna.
9. In two 1 1/2-quart shallow casseroles, layer each with half the eggplant.
10. Sprinkle with one-quarter of Parmesan cheese.
11. Layer half the zucchini and one-quarter of mozzarella.
12. Spoon half the tuna mixture over each; top with remaining mozzarella and Parmesan cheeses.
13. Bake one casserole, uncovered, in a preheated 350°F oven for 20 to 25 minutes.
14. Cover unbaked casserole with freezer paper and date; freeze for later use, up to 1 month.
15. To bake frozen casserole, place in a preheated 375°F oven for 50 to 60 minutes; let cool 10 minutes before serving.
